---
title: "MB5370-Marine data analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-28"
---

## Introduction


```{r}
coral_bleaching<-read.csv("C:/Users/jd131798/Downloads/Marine_data_analysis/Marine_data_analysis/Data/Coral_Bleaching.csv")
head(coral_bleaching)
```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```


```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```

```{r}

```
